mapper.sql: SPRINT_ID, PROJECT_ID, SPRINT_NAME, GOAL, STATUS, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
S.SPRINT_ID, S.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, S.SPRINT_NAME, S.GOAL, S.STATUS, S.START_DATE, S.END_DATE, S.CREATED_AT, S.UPDATED_AT

SI.SPRINT_ID, I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.ISSUE_TYPE, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.ASSIGNEE_ID, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS ASSIGNEE_NAME, I.DUE_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, SI.DISPLAY_ORDER
mapper.update: UPDATE SPRINT SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, SPRINT_NAME = #{sprintName}, GOAL = #{goal}, STATUS = #{status}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM SPRINT S INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON S.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE S.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}

SELECT
FROM SPRINT S INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON S.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID WHERE S.PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND S.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY S.START_DATE DESC, S.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT NULL AS SPRINT_ID, I.ISSUE_ID, I.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.ISSUE_TYPE, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, I.ASSIGNEE_ID, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS ASSIGNEE_NAME, I.DUE_DATE, I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0 AS DISPLAY_ORDER FROM ISSUE I INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON I.ASSIGNEE_ID = U.USER_ID
AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI WHERE SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID )
AND I.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
AND ( I.ISSUE_KEY ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR I.TITLE ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR P.PROJECT_CODE ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR P.PROJECT_NAME ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE I.PRIORITY WHEN 'URGENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, CASE WHEN I.DUE_DATE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, I.DUE_DATE ASC, I.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT
FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON I.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON I.ASSIGNEE_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} ORDER BY SI.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, I.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT SPRINT_ID, ISSUE_ID, DISPLAY_ORDER, CREATED_AT FROM SPRINT_ISSUE WHERE SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND ISSUE_ID = #{issueId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS IN ('ANALYZING', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'DEV_DONE', 'REVIEWING', 'TESTING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ACTIVE_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.DUE_DATE < #{today} AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DELAYED_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)), 0) AS ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0)), 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}

SELECT I.STATUS, COUNT(*) AS ISSUE_COUNT FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} GROUP BY I.STATUS ORDER BY CASE I.STATUS WHEN 'REGISTERED' THEN 1 WHEN 'ANALYZING' THEN 2 WHEN 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 3 WHEN 'DEV_DONE' THEN 4 WHEN 'REVIEWING' THEN 5 WHEN 'TESTING' THEN 6 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 7 WHEN 'DONE' THEN 8 WHEN 'HOLD' THEN 9 WHEN 'CLOSED' THEN 10 ELSE 99 END

SELECT I.ASSIGNEE_ID, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS ASSIGNEE_NAME, COUNT(*) AS ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)), 0) AS ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0)), 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON I.ASSIGNEE_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} GROUP BY I.ASSIGNEE_ID, U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME ORDER BY SPENT_MINUTES DESC, ISSUE_COUNT DESC, ASSIGNEE_NAME ASC

SELECT I.ISSUE_ID, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE, I.STATUS, I.PRIORITY, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS ASSIGNEE_NAME, I.DUE_DATE, COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) AS ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES, (I.DUE_DATE < #{today} AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED')) AS DELAYED, (I.PRIORITY IN ('URGENT', 'HIGH') AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED')) AS HIGH_PRIORITY, (COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0) > COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)) AS OVER_EFFORT FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON I.ASSIGNEE_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') AND ( I.DUE_DATE < #{today} OR I.PRIORITY IN ('URGENT', 'HIGH') OR (COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(I.SPENT_MINUTES, 0) > COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN I.DUE_DATE < #{today} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE I.PRIORITY WHEN 'URGENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, CASE WHEN I.DUE_DATE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, I.DUE_DATE ASC, I.ISSUE_KEY ASC

SELECT TE.TEST_EVIDENCE_ID, TE.ISSUE_ID, I.ISSUE_KEY, TE.TEST_NAME, TE.TEST_TARGET, TE.RESULT_STATUS, COALESCE(U.DISPLAY_NAME, U.USERNAME) AS TESTER_NAME, TE.TESTED_AT FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN TEST_EVIDENCE TE ON SI.ISSUE_ID = TE.ISSUE_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON TE.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON TE.TESTER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND TE.RESULT_STATUS IN ('FAIL', 'BLOCKED') ORDER BY TE.TESTED_AT DESC, I.ISSUE_KEY ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT WL.WORK_DATE AS SNAPSHOT_DATE, COALESCE(SUM(WL.SPENT_MINUTES), 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES FROM SPRINT S INNER JOIN SPRINT_ISSUE SI ON S.SPRINT_ID = SI.SPRINT_ID INNER JOIN WORK_LOG WL ON SI.ISSUE_ID = WL.ISSUE_ID WHERE S.SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND (S.START_DATE IS NULL OR WL.WORK_DATE >= S.START_DATE) AND (S.END_DATE IS NULL OR WL.WORK_DATE <= S.END_DATE) GROUP BY WL.WORK_DATE ORDER BY WL.WORK_DATE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPRINT_ISSUE ( SPRINT_ID, ISSUE_ID, DISPLAY_ORDER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{issueId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt} )
